articles.title: PEPE Could Knock Out Shiba Inu As Unexpected ‘Memecoin Momentum’ Builds Up — Here’s Why
articles.description: There have been rumours and debates on whether PEPE can mount a significant bull run to dislodge Shiba Inu (SHIB) as a top meme coin.

articles.title: Telegram Revolutionizes Monetization with Toncoin for Ad Purchases
articles.description: This weekend is marked by significant news about Telegram – the integration of Toncoin as a payment method. Now, advertisers will be able to use it to buy in-platform ads. This new step in the Telegram monetization strategy is part of its aspiration to create a comfortable environment for users and pay content creators for […]

articles.title: Solana DeFi Trading Hits All-Time High Amid Meme Coin Frenzy
articles.description: Decentralized exchanges on Solana just had a record month as meme coins like Dogwifhat (WIF) and others continue flying.

articles.title: Bitcoin-Powered Core DAO (CORE) Skyrockets By 220%, Here’s Why
articles.description: Core DAO (CORE), the cryptocurrency behind the Core blockchain, has seen its price skyrocket by 220% over the last week, marking a significant milestone in its market performance. As of the last 24 hours, CORE has seen an additional 63% increase, accumulating a staggering 350% gain in just nine days. This rally has elevated Core DAO to the 55th position among all cryptocurrencies by market...

articles.title: Telegram Launches Toncoin Payments for Ads, Shares Revenue with Channel Owners
articles.description: Telegram introduces Toncoin for ad buys, promising 50% revenue share with channel owners

articles.title: TRON Fights SEC Lawsuit: A Battle Over Global ICOs and Regulatory Clarity
